creator: koji@jp.above.net
text:
Update of mail/courier-imap port from 0.33 to 0.35.

How-To-Repeat: diff -ur courier-imap.orig/Makefile courier-imap/Makefile
--- courier-imap.orig/Makefile  Thu Jun 22 07:36:14 2000
+++ courier-imap/Makefile       Mon Jul  3 11:50:26 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      courier-imap
-PORTVERSION=   0.33
+PORTVERSION=   0.35
 CATEGORIES=    mail ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    courier
diff -ur courier-imap.orig/files/md5 courier-imap/files/md5
--- courier-imap.orig/files/md5 Thu Jun 22 07:36:14 2000
+++ courier-imap/files/md5      Mon Jul  3 11:50:58 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (courier-imap-0.33.tar.gz) = 8ae13c0a4f89ca7ea51477b982c54632
+MD5 (courier-imap-0.35.tar.gz) = 70080e8f4f42b13c73ec6b8f83f3e2d6
